mapper.insert: INSERT INTO warning_log (user_id, warning_type, warning_content, is_read, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{warningType}, #{warningContent}, #{isRead}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{isDeleted})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM warning_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM warning_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM warning_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE warning_log SET is_read = #{isRead}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE warning_log SET is_read = #{isRead}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.delete: UPDATE warning_log SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM warning_log WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM warning_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND warning_type = #{warningType} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM warning_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND warning_type = #{warningType} AND create_time >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00') AND is_deleted = 0
